analysis.doc: Synchronized from Linear issue identifier: POL-547

POL-547.title: IMPLEMENT: Make PR creation the terminal finalize action
POL-547.body:
## Objective

Redesign `polaris finalize` so PR creation (step 10) is the last action that touches the git-tracked working tree — no step after it may leave a tracked-file diff.

## Context

Produced by ANALYZE issue [POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop). Reproduced live in this repo: `stepUpdateState`/`stepArchive` (`src/finalize/steps/09-update-state.ts`, `src/finalize/steps/12-archive.ts`) write to tracked files (`.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json`, `.polaris/runs/run-report.md`, and a new `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` folder) after `stepCreatePr` has already pushed and opened the PR. `git status` on this repo currently shows exactly that drift left over from [POL-434](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-434/implement-reconcile-route-local-polarismd-generation-and-drift)'s finalize run (PR #171). Chosen fix direction (user-confirmed): untrack finalize's post-PR bookkeeping paths from git rather than folding them into a second commit or dropping them outright — local bookkeeping keeps existing, it just stops being tracked-repo state.

## Goal

After a full `polaris finalize run` delivery, `git status --porcelain` reports no diff attributable to finalize's own post-PR writes. PR creation remains the terminal durable delivery evidence; `stepUpdateLinear`'s external Linear call is explicitly exempted (not a tracked-repo mutation, and it inherently needs the PR URL).

## Scope

* .gitignore
* src/finalize/index.ts
* src/finalize/steps/09-update-state.ts
* src/finalize/steps/12-archive.ts
* src/finalize/finalize.test.ts
* src/finalize/POLARIS.md
* src/finalize/SUMMARY.md

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Legacy tracked bookkeeping files (`.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json`, `.polaris/runs/run-report.md`) are untracked via `git rm --cached` while remaining on disk and gitignored.
- [ ] `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` per-run archive subdirectories are covered by `.gitignore` (not just the four top-level filenames currently listed).
- [ ] The tracked cluster-state snapshot (`.polaris/clusters/<id>/state.json`) is no longer mutated with `pr_url`/post-PR fields after PR creation; `pr_url` continues to be recorded only in the untracked local state file.
- [ ] A regression test asserts the git working tree has no tracked-file diff attributable to finalize immediately after a full delivery run.
- [ ] `src/finalize/POLARIS.md`/`SUMMARY.md` document the new contract: no tracked-file writes after `stepCreatePr`.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize

## Ordering

Cluster is internally ordered — see clusters.json ([POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop) analysis) for child sequencing.

## Non-goals

* Do not change QC repair-loop or Closeout Librarian behavior that adds further commits to an already-open PR — that is a related but architecturally separate concern (repair loop re-opening delivered work), left for future doctrine discussion.
* Do not change `stepUpdateLinear`'s post-PR timing — it is an external-service call, not a tracked-repo-state mutation, and inherently needs the PR URL as input.
* Do not drop `pr_url`/archive bookkeeping entirely — it must remain available locally (via untracked files), just not git-tracked.

POL-434.title: Implement: Reconcile route-local POLARIS.md generation and drift detection

POL-552.title: Stop staging the now-gitignored per-run archive directory in finalize's commit step
POL-552.body:
## Objective

Fix a regression: `src/finalize/steps/06-commit.ts` still unconditionally stages `.polaris/runs/<run-id>` (the per-run archive directory), which [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per) made git-ignored — causing `git add` to fail outright during finalize's own commit step.

## Context

Discovered while finalizing [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action) itself: `polaris finalize run` failed at step 8/14 with `git add` refusing an ignored path (`.polaris/runs/polaris-run-terminal-finalize-2026-07-13-001`), because `stepCommit` in `src/finalize/steps/06-commit.ts` (line ~12) builds its staging list as `[...getArtifactPromotionStageTargets(cluster_id), runArchiveTarget]` where `runArchiveTarget = .polaris/runs/${state.run_id}`. This file was not in [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action)'s original cluster scope (only `.gitignore`, `src/finalize/index.ts`, `steps/09-update-state.ts`, `steps/12-archive.ts` were scoped), so it was missed when [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per) added the `.polaris/runs/*/` ignore rule. Since this cluster's whole purpose is to stop tracking post-PR/per-run bookkeeping paths, force-adding this directory would contradict the goal — the correct fix is to stop staging it, not bypass the ignore rule.

## Goal

`polaris finalize run` completes its commit step (step 8/14) cleanly without attempting to `git add` a git-ignored path. The per-run archive directory under `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` remains untracked, consistent with [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per)/[POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr)'s contract.

## Scope

* src/finalize/steps/06-commit.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `stepCommit` no longer includes `runArchiveTarget` (`.polaris/runs/${state.run_id}`) in the list of paths passed to `git add`.
- [ ] `finalize.test.ts` (or a new/updated test in that file) covers the case where `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` already has content on disk before the finalize commit step runs, asserting `git add` is not attempted on that path and the commit still succeeds.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize/finalize.test.ts

## Ordering

* None — runs after [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per)/[POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr)/[POL-550](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-550/add-regression-test-git-working-tree-is-clean-after-finalize-delivery)/[POL-551](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-551/document-the-terminal-pr-evidence-contract-in-finalize), which are all already Done.

## Non-goals

* Do not change `getArtifactPromotionStageTargets` or `artifact-policy.ts`'s general promotion rules — only remove the specific `runArchiveTarget` addition.
* Do not change `stepArchive` (step 14, `12-archive.ts`) — it still legitimately writes to `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` as untracked local bookkeeping; this child only stops finalize's commit step from trying to git-add that directory.

POL-551.title: Document the terminal-PR-evidence contract in finalize POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md
POL-551.body:
## Objective

Record the new finalize contract in local canon so future edits don't reintroduce post-PR tracked-file mutation.

## Context

Part of [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action) (IMPLEMENT parent, from ANALYZE [POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop)), the closing child in this cluster once the behavioral changes ([POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per), [POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr)) and their regression test ([POL-550](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-550/add-regression-test-git-working-tree-is-clean-after-finalize-delivery)) are in place.

## Goal

`src/finalize/POLARIS.md` and `src/finalize/SUMMARY.md` state plainly that PR creation (step 10) is the terminal tracked-repo-state mutation, that `stepUpdateLinear`'s post-PR external Linear call is an explicit, deliberate exception (not a tracked-file write), and that local post-PR bookkeeping (state, archive, cluster-state pr_url) lives only in git-ignored paths.

## Scope

* src/finalize/POLARIS.md
* src/finalize/SUMMARY.md

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `src/finalize/POLARIS.md` "Editing rules" or "Route model" section gains a rule stating no step after `stepCreatePr` may write to a git-tracked path, with `stepUpdateLinear` named as the sole, deliberate exception.
- [ ] `src/finalize/SUMMARY.md` "Key behaviors" reflects the same contract in one line.
- [ ] No source code changed in this child.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass (sanity check — should be a no-op for these doc-only files).

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test

## Ordering

* Depends on [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per), [POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr), and [POL-550](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-550/add-regression-test-git-working-tree-is-clean-after-finalize-delivery) being done first.

## Non-goals

* Do not modify any file outside `src/finalize/POLARIS.md` and `src/finalize/SUMMARY.md`.

POL-550.title: Add regression test: git working tree is clean after finalize delivery
POL-550.body:
## Objective

Prove, with an automated test, that `runFinalize`'s delivery path leaves no tracked-file diff after PR creation.

## Context

Part of [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action) (IMPLEMENT parent, from ANALYZE [POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop)), the final code change in this cluster after [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per) (untrack legacy paths) and [POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr) (stop cluster-state pr_url mutation) land.

## Goal

A test in `src/finalize/finalize.test.ts` runs (or simulates) a full `runFinalize` delivery against a fixture repo and asserts `git status --porcelain` is clean immediately after `stepCreatePr` returns — i.e., no test regresses if a future change reintroduces a post-PR tracked-file write.

## Scope

* src/finalize/finalize.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New test exercises the delivery path through PR creation (mocking `createDraftPr`/GitHub and Linear calls as the existing test suite already does) and asserts no tracked-file diff remains afterward.
- [ ] Test fails if `stepUpdateState`, `stepAppendJsonl`, or `stepArchive` write to a tracked path after `stepCreatePr` (regression guard for [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per)/[POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr)).
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize/finalize.test.ts

## Ordering

* Depends on [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per) and [POL-549](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-549/stop-cluster-state-snapshot-from-being-mutated-with-pr-url-after-pr) being done first.

## Non-goals

* Do not modify `stepCreatePr`, `stepUpdateLinear`, or any non-test finalize source file in this child.

POL-549.title: Stop cluster-state snapshot from being mutated with pr_url after PR creation
POL-549.body:
## Objective

Remove the tracked-file write that currently happens after PR creation: promoting `pr_url`/post-PR state into `.polaris/clusters/<id>/state.json`.

## Context

Part of [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action) (IMPLEMENT parent, from ANALYZE [POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop)). In `src/finalize/index.ts`, Step 11 (`~line 1122-1139`) calls `stepUpdateState` (writes `pr_url` and `status: "complete"` into the run's state file) and then promotes that same state into the tracked cluster-state snapshot at `.polaris/clusters/<cluster-id>/state.json` — both writes happen after `stepCreatePr` (step 10) has already pushed and opened the PR, so they are never captured in a commit.

## Goal

`.polaris/clusters/<id>/state.json` (a tracked file) is never written to after PR creation. `pr_url` and post-PR status continue to be recorded, but only in the run's local state file, which per the sibling child is now untracked.

## Scope

* src/finalize/index.ts
* src/finalize/steps/09-update-state.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The cluster-state snapshot write block in `src/finalize/index.ts` (currently right after Step 11) no longer executes after `stepCreatePr`, or no longer writes `pr_url`/post-PR-only fields into the tracked snapshot.
- [ ] `stepUpdateState` continues to write `pr_url` and `status: "complete"` to the run's own state file (now untracked per the sibling child) so local tooling (`polaris runs`, `polaris loop status`) keeps working.
- [ ] Existing finalize tests that assert on `pr_url`/cluster-state snapshot behavior are updated to match the new contract, not deleted.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize

## Ordering

* Depends on [POL-548](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-548/untrack-legacy-finalize-bookkeeping-files-and-extend-gitignore-for-per) (untrack legacy bookkeeping files) being done first.

## Non-goals

* Do not change `stepCreatePr`, `stepAppendJsonl`, or `stepUpdateLinear` behavior in this child.
* Do not remove `pr_url` from the `LoopState` schema or from `src/loop/checkpoint.ts`.

POL-548.title: Untrack legacy finalize bookkeeping files and extend .gitignore for per-run archives
POL-548.body:
## Objective

Stop `.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json`, `.polaris/runs/run-report.md`, and per-run archive folders under `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` from showing up as tracked-repo diffs.

## Context

Part of [POL-547](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-547/implement-make-pr-creation-the-terminal-finalize-action) (IMPLEMENT parent, from ANALYZE [POL-546](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-546/analyze-make-the-pull-request-the-terminal-finalize-evidence-and-stop)). Both `.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json` and `.polaris/runs/run-report.md` are already listed in `.gitignore` but remain tracked because they were committed before the ignore rules were added — `git ls-files` confirms both are still tracked, and `git status` on this repo currently shows them as modified. Separately, `.polaris/runs/<run-id>/` subdirectories created by `stepArchive` (step 14) are not covered by any ignore rule at all — only four specific top-level filenames under `.polaris/runs/` are ignored (`mutation-queue.json`, `current-state.json`, `run-report.md`, `current-state.pre-pol-198.json`).

## Goal

`git status --porcelain` no longer reports the legacy tracked bookkeeping files or new per-run archive directories as diffs, on this repo and going forward.

## Scope

* .gitignore

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `git rm --cached .taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json .polaris/runs/run-report.md` applied (files remain on disk, untracked going forward).
- [ ] `.gitignore` gains a rule covering `.polaris/runs/*/` (per-run archive subdirectories), without breaking the existing top-level exceptions already listed under `.polaris/runs/`.
- [ ] `git status --porcelain` run against this repo's current working tree no longer lists `.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json`, `.polaris/runs/run-report.md`, or any `.polaris/runs/polaris-run-*/` directory.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* git status --porcelain (manually confirm no finalize-bookkeeping paths listed)

## Ordering

* None — first child in the cluster.

## Non-goals

* Do not touch `.polaris/clusters/<id>/state.json` tracking (handled in the next child).
* Do not change any `src/` code in this child.

POL-546.title: ANALYZE: Make the pull request the terminal finalize evidence and stop post-delivery tracked-state mutation
